original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
original_registry_entry.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.

exact_sections.heading: 6. Red Flags and 7. Clinical Manifestation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports usage-related joint pain, stiffness, motion restriction, tenderness, swelling, instability, functional limitation, night pain, fever, redness or heat, weight loss, and systemic concern features.

exact_sections.heading: 8.1.4 Knee and 8.1.5 Hip
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Describes knee pain location, stairs-related pain, giving way, instability, and hip groin or thigh pain, stiffness, walking pain, restricted movement, and early loss of internal rotation.

exact_sections.heading: 9. Diagnosis and Imaging
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.

exact_sections.heading: 11. Referral Criteria
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines concern and specialist contexts including a hot swollen joint, persistent fever, night symptoms, weight loss, face-to-face assessment needs, worsening symptoms, severe functional limitation, and selected imaging.

title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
intended_setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
access_limitations: Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
